headline: Exclusive BetMGM Bonus: Get $150 in Bonus Bets with Code CBSSPORTS!
content:
Get ready to elevate your game with an incredible offer from BetMGM! New users can unlock a fantastic **$150 in bonus bets**, instantly boosting their bankroll for an exhilarating start to their betting journey.

To claim this exclusive offer, simply sign up at BetMGM and make sure to use the special **promo code CBSSPORTS** during registration. This generous bonus is perfect for US bettors looking to wager on major sporting events like NBA, NHL, and MLB, giving you more chances to win big.

Don't miss out on this limited-time opportunity to kickstart your betting adventure. Head over to BetMGM now, use code CBSSPORTS, and claim your $150 bonus bets before this fantastic offer expires!
